reviews.review_text: We haven't been here in years and the upgrades are absolutely amazing. Big pool that's suitable for toddlers and adults. Big trees that make it feel like a bit of a forest sanctuary. Great facilities for kids - the pool area has shallow paddle areas for small kids, lap pool for adults, a spa and big TV to watch in there. There's a jumping balloon and different games areas for the whole family. Loads of dog friendly sites and a lovely fenced park area with a water cascade and a pond that our dogs played in. Plus chickens you can feed. The fenced dog friendly sites and cabins are towards the back of the park and are very quiet. It feels more like a mini nature farm resort than a caravan park. Highly recommend if you're in Ballarat!!
I had 2 rehomed greyhounds with me. It was a perfect place and even though it was an utterly terrible day weather wise....the cabin was perfect....my new place to stay in Ballarat with the dogs.

Wow!!
First we rocked up and it was super quiet and looked so nice. I walk up to reception and seen a mini gym... which you dont see at many caravan parks. So ✔️
Then I go into reception and was greeted by a young lady (short red hair) very polite and informative. Super friendly!! Another ✔️
Then we go to our room.. mind you its a pet friendly cabin. With member discount came down to $180.
Its honestly the best cabin we have ever had that is dog friendly. As soon as we walked in.. it smelt so clean and like flowers... was so nice. The yard was setup for dogs too.. all fenced. I think all caravan parks should be set up like this.
We only stayed for 1 night so I didnt get to take photos of the powered sights for pets. Which are all fenced... which is so good!! So I took some of the powered sights photos of their site.
But anyone with dogs.. I would highly recommend this place. I would love to come back.. in the cabin or even on the sights. 😁 just at because we have dogs the cabins are always run down or just cheap looking, so it was nice to have something modern and new and well thought out. We could let our dogs out and have our gates shut and not worry. They had their own little yard ☺️
We also had electric blankets 😍
Coffee machine
A heated pool with 2 spas (in the park)
The room was super clean i felt bad for dirting the floor 😅
But was a great stay and we loved it ❤️
Thankyou for making our stay amazing

This park has a little village feel from the design of the cabins to the lovely gardens throughout. Seemed to be lots of drive through sites, with small gardens separating the sites. I loved the newly renovated amenities block - with the heated shower room and toilets separated. Thanks also for Ballarat radio playing in these for a local touch! Lots of added extras like the heated pool and excellent play equipment - even a gym! We had a problem with our jockey wheel on exit and the staff at the park were very kind. The maintenance staff were patient and really helped us sort out the issue. The park is a little out of the CBD, but Ballarat is a big spread out city and most attractions are a drive anyway. We loved our stay, thank you so much.

We had such a great stay at this caravan park and honestly couldn’t fault it. The gated powered sites were a huge highlight for us being able to let our dog roam safely around our site made the whole experience so much more relaxing. On top of that, the dedicated gated dog run with a pond was amazing. Our dog absolutely loved having space to explore, sniff, and play. The bathrooms were spotless and really spacious.What really stood out though was the staff. They were incredibly friendly and went above and beyond to help us out when we had issues with our caravan.
Overall, such a welcoming, well maintained park with fantastic facilities especially if you’re travelling with a dog. We’ll definitely be back!
Fantastic place to stay if in Ballarat. Friendly staff and great facilities
Terrific. Helpful friendly staff. Good vesinity to shops etc.Great park will definitely stay again
Excellent place to stay even if you have a dog. Couldn't fault anything!

Exceptional stay at the Windmill park in Ballarat. Supermarket and a small selection of restaurants within walking distance.
Great facilities, regardless of accommodation option. We had a 2 bedroom cabin that contained everything required for our little family.
Tennis, basketball courts, a pet billabong and a heated indoor pool, with 2 spas! Heavenly.
The chickens were an added highlight.
The staff were so friendly and helpful, always happy to try and help as best as they could.
Our room was ready early and we were advised by text! Enjoyed a late checkout too.
We will be back for sure!
Great park, well maintained. Clean facilities. Variety of activities for the kids, nightly movies with popcorn during school holidays. Would stay again and would recommend!

Very good accommodation. There's plenty of activities to keep the kids busy. Pool was great with several spa's and indoor too. Our dogs loved the billabong. There are shops for general shopping within a kilometre. Great facility and great location.
Not really happy pay for a site and what do you a dirt site.Very third class.If one pays $52.00 one would expect better than that

The staff here do a great job and the place seems like it's in good hands in terms of general management. They couldn't have been much better. I stayed in a tent in a dog site and he loved your dog lagoon, which was well looked after. Thanks
Great staff facilities 10/10
This is one of the most friendly, caring and flexible caravan parks we have ever visited. Thank you so much!

These people who run this place are truly amazing. We made a last-minute change to our booking from Friday to Saturday, and even though they were nearly fully booked, they went out of their way to accommodate us in another cabin. They even had it cleaned and ready for us, which we really appreciated.

The rooms are clean, comfortable, and well-kept, and the pet-friendly area is just fantastic. The little pet park is such a thoughtful touch and made our stay even more enjoyable.

Overall, a wonderful place with exceptional service we absolutely loved it and will definitely be back!
Nice park & good facilities. Really the dog friendly sites

There were a couple of choices for caravan parks in Ballarat and I can’t complain about my choice. Got myself and friendly welcome when I arrived, as well as one when I booked over the phone. The neighbours I had were great, and I hope that I was the same for them. The amenities block was fine, as was the camp kitchen. What more can I say? I really like this place.

Second stay and nothing has changed. Still a friendly welcome and a great vibe all around the park. The camp kitchen, this time, inspired me to cook my own dinners...which worked out quite well. Ballarat is a great place for geocaching, so I know I will be back.

Indoor pool was a win for the kids and adults!
The sites are gravel or dirt
Excellent, this is the future of pet friendly travel. The enclosed dog area with rock pools and tracks is so cool!
Great park for those of us with fur babies, enclosed sites and wonderful Billabong for our furry friends. Also excellent camp kitchen and amenities for us humans
We love this park, children enjoy the activities and pool. Easy access with our van. Ensuite site was perfect for us. Nice and and spacious. Water in shower was hot and pressure was good.

The room where we stayed was Wattle 26 and you could tell it needed a lot of maintenance done on it.  The combined bathroom toilet had not been cleaned and there was a distinct smell of urine similar to a male urinal.  The cleaning left a lot to be desired and before we could sit in the patio area we had to clean it.  Even though they were advised that 2 people were sharing in seperate rooms I had to make my own bunk up and this room would have been the size of a laundry.  No net curtains on any windows so people walking past can see straight in.  Swimming pool and spa area was nice but needed major work on roof area.  You had to be careful getting into spa with no hand rails as step was very low.  In closing would I stay there again yes in an upgraded cabin but ours was not worth $178.75 a night.  Must also add that Darren the maintenance man was fantastic and even though it was not his job he actually cleaned our toilet for us and unblocked our sink in bathroom.

We visited Ballarat last minute and were pleasantly surprised with how great this place is! Friendly staff, clean and comfortable cabins and everything nearby that you need - not to mention super dog friendly - for a relaxing family holiday! Our kids loved the pool and go karts too! We will be back!

We spent 3 days at Windmill Caravan Park in Ballarat and were extremely impressed with their fully fenced pet friendly sites. Easy to get in and out of and the area was immaculately maintained. Highly recommend this park!

The staff at the service desk were so helpful and accommodating
We didn’t bring our dog this time but we will next time as the paw park area is great

Great stay as a solo traveller on an unpowered site. The newer area has lush green grass and is really well set out.
Amenities were excellent — clean, modern toilets and showers. Staff were friendly, booking was easy, and they explained everything clearly on arrival.
Good location for exploring Ballarat. The park was quiet even though it seemed busy, which I really appreciated.
Clean, safe, and well maintained — I’d stay again
Great Caravan Park, lovely staff and very dog friendly. Great location and amenities are modern very clean. Highly recommend this park if your travelling with or without dogs

A very nice park
The kids had an absolute ball with the facilities
Amazing place for dog parents

A great caravan park to stay at. Safe. Clean and tidy. Great facilities and super conveniently located for easy access to Ballarat Central.
The dog section is amazing. Best we’ve seen on our travels.
Would definitely stay again … did I mention the heated indoor pool?
Lovely friendly helpful staff.
Great park to have a break our pet friendly site was fantastic will definitely come and stay there again I
Veldig flott plass, stille og rolig. Flott bassengområde,  fine toalett/dusj område.

We recently stayed here for 3 nights on a dog friendly, fully enclosed powered site.
WOW what a fantastic place to pull up, let your dogs off their leash. The dog enclosure park has thought of everything. Us Adults enjoyed the heated pool and spa. Walking distance to shop and cafe. Definitely will return. Thank you to the beautiful staff you made us feel extremely welcome

Easy access for vans and a lovely shady park  Not too big but with great facilities for adults as well as children. An indoor pool with hot spa, tennis and basketball court. Gym and a games room, camp kitchen and meeting room. Dog owners have special fenced area and the park is very close to the Ballarat to Skipton Rail Trail and a Wetlands reserve. Dynamic pricing,  so depending on when you book it could be anywhere between  $55 and $70 a night - not cheap!

The staff were very friendly and helpful. A nice park with clean facilities, the garbage bins were close by and collected every day. We enjoyed our stay here in our caravan and will return if passing through again.
Was a great part but we were camping but no grass, just dirt.
We had a wonderful stay on an ensuite site. The park is beautiful, very clean and so many things to keep the kids happy and active.

Great place to stay. Very quiet. Close to shops.
A very refreshing pool complex.
Even has a gym if your so inclined

An incredible family holiday! Fun, adventurous, and still so relaxing. The kids had the freedom to explore safely, and we all enjoyed peaceful afternoons by the pool. The perfect balance for everyone.

The accommodation itself was good — clean, comfortable, and well located.

However, we had a disappointing and avoidable issue with reception communication. On the day of check-in, I asked if my wife could leave her luggage at reception on her last day, as she was attending a seminar and had nowhere else to store her belongings. We were clearly told this would be allowed.

The day before checkout, when my wife confirmed the arrangement, reception staff refused to store the luggage. This sudden change caused unnecessary stress and disrupted plans that were made based on the original approval.

This reflects inconsistent customer service and poor communication between staff. Management should review reception procedures to ensure guests are not given conflicting information.

Apart from this issue, the stay was acceptable.

Great little holiday spot , so dog friendly, great idea with little billabong for pups to cool off and dog wash too , well thought out .
Nice touch with the BBQ and sitting area right next to it .

Reception ladies were friendly and accommodating.
Other guests were all friendly especially the dog owners.
Awesome park for dog owners and families.
Cabin was comfortable and quiet location.
Definitely recommend, thank you!
Will be back again thanks

This was a bit further out of town than we expected. There is a great dog-friendly camping area… sites are fenced and have artificial grass. Our regular site had some natural grass and plenty of dust. Bathrooms and camp kitchen were good. Swimming pool was a relief in the heat wave.
A fantastic place to stay with your family (great pool, varied and friendly facilities, top-notch staff!)
Walk to Woolworth was a bonus. Pool was good but always crowded. Recommend going first thing in the morning. Rec room was good and we made use of bbqs that are dotted around.
Very clean with amazing facilities at a great price

Awesome little park
The pet enclosure sites are very good.
Be very good once the grass takes hold . keep up the good work team
Great caravan park with clean facilities and helpful staff.
The park itself is spotless. The staff are super friendly and very approachable. Thank you again for accommodating us.
I would like to mention the step in the pathway leading down from the men’s toilet block ( new block) maybe needs a yellow line painted across it (as I had a bit of tumble)
So many activities for the kids !! Pool is great

This Park is one of our favourite parks! You are always met by very friendly, professional and helpful staff, who are always excellent for great service and suggestions!
Great staff and a clean and well managed park is the key to a great customer experience when you stay at BIG4 Windmill, Ballarat.
The gardens around the park are kept so well. Wait to you see their roses - so good! 😃
We love that if you have a dog, you can get a site with a fence around. The rest of the park is dog free - we love that. After we left the park, the next day at a new caravan park, there was a mound of dog poo 💩 on our site! Just gross.This happens quite often in different parks.
Apart from all the great facilities in the park, they have a coffee truck in the mornings and the  first night there was a food truck 🚚 Sidewalk Cantino Mexican Cuisine. Wow....was that delicious 😋
Visit here, and you will be impressed!!
Fabulous park to stay pet friendly area fantastic would stay again. Only downside was some people like anywhere don’t clean up after their pets.
Love this park. Staff are wonderful. Loved the dog enclosure. Pool was great as usual.

This park would have to be the best park that we’ve been to in the last few months. Not only do they cater for pets in brilliant enclosed site, they even have a doggy billabong (walk around the waterfalls and they get to play in the ponds) a free doggy wash. They are also separate from the general sites so the dogs don’t annoy other users. They also offer pet friendly cabins within the doggy area - all sites enclosed.
The kids playground & pool is at the opposite end of the park so the kids can play without worrying about dogs.
Love it - hopefully other parks will take up the concept.
Highly
Booked powered Grass site. No grass at All. Too much dust and sand all the time.
Your kids and dogs will love this place. Only thing would good if there was a bloom available to clean gum leaves off the fake grass
Our family just spent 3 nights here, it was absolutely wonderful, a great base to head into town from, very clean, friendly staff, plenty for the kids to do. We will definitely be back.

Staying in a dog friendly pen area. We have enjoyed being able to relax w our dog being close by and safe. They have an awesome off lead dog area w water park for the dogs to cool down in. Only 1 dog in at a time and everyone has been respecting this.
The park was packed.  Very clean and modern facilities.  Plenty of kids play activities. Not far from the shops, pub and yown centre. Overall its a good spot to stay.

We hired a powered site for our motorhome. Check in was simple, finding our site was easy, accessing power and water was easy. Main toilet block and laundry were close by, the pool and the barbecue were also close by the pool area was a great set up - covered heated with a heated spa and a great TV screen. We loved watching the 20/20 cricket while we had a swim and then finished off with the barbecue right out the front of the pool area.  Camp kitchen, gym and rec room also great areas. Great value and a pleasant stay with helpful staff.
I really like this place. I’ve been back five times. My kids had great fun. The facilities are perfect. Staff are friendly. Location is good.
Kids love the facilities, especially the indoor pool and the recreation room. Convenient location and good choice for a relaxed family holiday.

We rented the bluegum cabin. It holds 2 Queen sized beds (one of which has its own ensuit), and 4 bunk beds. There were only 4 of us, but as one of us was elderly with difficulty with mobility, it was our best option.
The cabin was immaculate when we arrived. It felt very private as well, being down the end of a lane way.
We had no problems with any of the appliances, stovetop, microwave, etc. It was well stocked and extremely clean.
The only problem we all had was the hardness of the mattresses. We all woke each morning feeling stiff and sore.
The other facilities at the park were also fantastic. We especially enjoyed the scenic wetland walk, and the pool, and the kids loved the jumping pillow.
We have been here once before, and I would definitely stay here again.
Absolutely loved it.
A great short stay, facilities are great, excellent camp kitchen and amazing set up for dogs with fenced campsites and dog park.

We stayed in a cabin. Excellent value, beds better than the Westin. Woolies is just down the road, but the vending machines are well stocked in a pinch. Laundry facilities on site. The natural filtration dog pool is our personal highlight, but there are many other facilities to keep kids and adults alike entertained. The gardens are impeccably maintained and give you something new to admire every time you go for a wander around the grounds. It’s also situated right by a beautiful wetlands/bush walk.

Stayed at the Ballarat big 4 for 4 nights over chirstmas, room was clean when we arrived checking in was a breeze and the kids really enjoyed the facilities. Swimming play ground and jumping pillow. Nice place to unwind. We also done a couple of museums while staying in ballarat on windmill parks recomdation very informative

Great park! Can tell the owners are travellers themselves as the little touches included are often overlooked by other parks! Fenced pet sites were awesome and our Lab loved the dog pond park! We loved our stay and have rebooked already.
Great familysite.

We booked a dog friendly spot, unfortunately we, were given a different one than the one we booked, but in a way we got lucky, right next to the camp kitchen so cooking and cleaning up after was easy, also close enough to the shower toilet facilities, even though we are self contained, the dog friendly area was amazing and all the facilities were immaculate, yet somehow never saw a cleaner, definitely would stay here again… We were also compensated for the mix up, and they did try to get the other people out of the spot we’d booked to which they declined.
Great little park!

Excellent park all round and best dog friendly park i have ever been too!
More changes happening. We stay in a dog friendly cabin overlooking the Wetlands. We loved it. Definitely be back.
Well done team👍
Lots of cabins.   Great place to hold an event or as a getaway.

3rd time staying here now for spilt milk weekend and it’s yet to disappoint. The rooms have always been nice and clean, the staff are lovely and there’s a shopping centre across the road which is very convenient. Will be back again next year

I’ve never been to a caravan park before that has dedicated fenced sites for dog owners and a dog waterpark. This place makes traveling with your fur babies easy.

The fenced sites cost a little bit more than the unfenced sites but the ease it creates is well worth it. I didn’t have to worry about going to the showers or camp kitchen, my dog was safely fenced in and happy after a big swim.

Easy check in, located on the western edge of Ballarat with a shopping centre less than a km away. Facilities were clean, modern and close to my site. Plenty of amenities, pool, gym, tennis, basketball and playground.

This is now my go to spot when visiting Ballarat.

Fantastic caravan park. Very quiet location not far from Ballarat city. Spotless amenities and grounds are a credit to the dedicated staff. Shopping centre nearby for your groceries. Large sites for any size vans. Indoor pool is fantastic. A great family friendly park with lots of kids play areas. Highly recommended. 5 stars 🤩

Oh my gosh. We came here with friends. The windmill caravan park is a paradise for yourself and your pets. To let my puppy whom I am training,  free and not have to worry about leashes is the best.
Taking our caravan and having the pet Area was awesome. Fully fenced around each caravan site. I was able to just let my lab go.
The water Area was so loved by my puppy, he full on zoomed around there, again all fully fenced. I am so glad you are pet friendly. Lovely to see. . Running up and down the fence With dogs on the other side, was also loved by my pup. The staff We’re fantastic. He is now fast asleep. He had so much exercise. We are all happy and relaxed. Thank you to you all. We will certainly be back, with family next time.
Great caravan park. Showers were the best we have used in a caravan park and we travel all over Australia with our small business.
Stayed 4 nights in a cabin for 2 people. Had everything we needed. Loved it was one road into town.  Lots of trees and kookaburras and a supermarket within walking distance. Would stay again
If you are travelling with dogs please stay here when you are in Ballarat.Has a fantastic billabong area for the dogs to run free around. Bedt part is one family at a time with their dogs.

Very clean facilities. Nice atmosphere. Friendly staff.
Good sized camp sites.
Quiet park
We had a great stay.

A lovely caravan and cabin park on the outskirts of Ballarat. Stayed in fantastic cabin while in town for business. Very nice grounds with great gardens. The enclosed pet friendly caravan sites and pet billabong look fantastic. Will definitely be coming back with the camper and family.

Had a great time with our fur baby. Loved the off leash billabong for Sunny to swim & run around in. Our dog friendly cabin was spacious & a small fenced in area at the back of the cabin, which overlooked the wetlands. Sunny would sit at the top of the stairs, morning & late arvo, watching the rabbits grazing on the grass behind us. He was fascinated!
Walks in the wetlands were peaceful & lots of birdlife to watch & listen to.
Loved the under cover pool & spa, enjoyed a peaceful swim & relaxing time in there.
Lots of big fenced areas for caravans & cars & dogs. No need to bring your own fencing when travelling with dogs.
Overall a lovely caravan park with a touch of European looking cabins & lots of trees & flowers & shrubs. We will definitely come back if in the area again!
The fully fenced sites have proper, sturdy fencing. What an awesome space that allows travel with dogs!

Absolute banger of a place to have a camping experience with pet. Awesome fenced site setup and pet can roam freely in enclosed space. Good clean facilities and indoor swimming pool, can't complain anything

We arrived very late and extremely exhausted  without a booking. There was an overnight officer who was fantastic, he arranged the booking and showed us around, in a friendly, welcoming way. The bathrooms and kitchen were clean and convenient. The buildings and landscaping are charming. Hoping to revisit!

2 nights in new van coming out of Melbourne.   Very helpful staff finding us an easy spot to park up.  If you have dogs this place is awesome with fully enclosed yards.  Pool is great, Spa fabulous! Lucas shops very close for all shopping needs.

Room is quite nice with a little bit of lake view. The dog park is also very pretty!

I just feel that check out time being 10am is too early. 11am would've been nicer, for the guests to enjoy their morning :)
A lovely park with  pleasant surroundings,  friendly team members and clean facilities.

Family of four stayed in pet friendly cabin #3 with small dog. Great location, facilities for dogs (Billabong play area, dog wash & large walking/play area) were awesome, kids loved the set up (pool, play equipment, jumping pillow & carts.

Cabin was clean and above expectation. Will return.
First time useage and very happy with the whole site

Great park. will back again.
Staff very friendly and helpful
This Park was in our top 5 that we have stayed at in our travels around Australia....when you are in Ballarat the Big 4 Windmill Holiday Park is the place to stay.
Friendly helpful staff. Amenities spotless and new, nice big area to dress that you can keep dry
Great place for our Avan to park
Lovely clean park good facilities
Great location,friendly staff. Good facilities for kids. Shops close by.

An absolutely great holiday park, super kid friendly with school holiday activities! Dog friendly and quiet alot for kids to do while here. A jumping pillow, heated inside pool, go kart hire and more. Updated amenities, shower/toilets and a cute kitchen area. We would definitely stay here again.

Our first time here, we camped on a powered site, sites were a good size with a concrete slab.
The amenities were all very nice, clean and decent sizes. Laundry was all very reasonably priced.
Children had an absolute ball, indoor heated pool nice & big with a small splash zone for littlies. Jumping pillow, playgrounds and sandpits were all a hit and we made daily visits to the local chickens to give them some scraps.
We attended in the school holidays where they did an activity each day for the children & a movie night each night. Was fantastic, will definitely be coming back.

I kinda don’t want to leave a rave review because then more people will find this hidden gem! A bit further out than the other Ballarat parks, but SO worth it! Cleanest bathrooms I’ve ever encountered at a holiday park, and the grounds are maintained with such care. Staff are really helpful and accommodating, and we love our free pancake brekkie on the Saturday!

Friendly staff was there to help with any questions.
Shared facilities was all ways clean and warm with heating in bathroom facilities.
This was our fourth time staying here this time with our caravan and will definitely be back again.

OMG I love this place !!!!!! ... our wattle cabin is literally PERFECT , son flogged me at air hockey , vending machine for my current cherry ripe addiction haha  , birds chirping , beautiful trees , shower is amazing (gotta have a good shower !!) ... We will definitely be back , love love love !!! 👌☆☆☆☆☆♡♡♡♡♡

Enjoyed a one night stay camping. Loved the facilities including the gym, jumping pillow, games room and kitchen.
The showers, camp kitchen and toilets have recently been upgraded loved it!

Was a little confused to find some chicken tenders around our tent in the morning though.
The site is spotlessly clean and tidy. We have a caravan and stopped there 4 nights September 2025. Definitely recommend to everyone.
One of the better parks I’ve stayed in.  Terrific staff and amenities
Loved our stay here, terrific hosts and facilities. Highly recommended

Excellent caravan park that is set up as really dog friendly. The staff are very pleasant, helpful and friendly. The pet friendly sites are great and make travelling with dogs very easy. The dog billabong was lovely. Clean, new toilet block is great and heated for those cold Ballarat winters. Close to a major supermarket so easy to get supplies. I highly recommend.

Windmill pk Ballarat early Sept 2025  - just stopped overnight, friendly staff. Site a bit average when wet but I was warned by friendly attendant it could be so.
Amenities very modern and even has heating !!

We booked in for a 2 night stay in our caravan. The site was large enough for our 22ft van to get into with minimal fuss. We had been away for some time so needed to use the laundry. It was well appointed with 2 new washing machines and 2 big dryers. The amenities block was quite new, clean and even had the heaters on in the chilly morning, nice touch and appreciated. Showers were good plenty of hot water and pressure. This is not our 1st stay at the windmill and won’t be our last. Keep up the good work.

We stay here regularly as we frequent visits to Ballarat. Always friendly & welcoming. Spotless amenities, fabulous heated indoor pool & hot spas. The only negative would be the toilet/change room in the pool area - it needs some benches to sit on to get changed, some hooks to hang clothes and bags & maybe some timber duck boards so you don't have to stand in an inch of water because the fall on the floor doesn't angle toward the drain.
Stayed many times

Lovely quiet campground with cabins and van sites amongst the trees.  The cabin was very clean and well-stocked.  There seems to be a lot of facilities and entertainment for families.

The campground is on the west side of Ballarat which is the opposite side from the tourist attractions but this suited us perfectly as we were there to visit family.  There is a railway reserve next to the campground which is perfect for a run.
If you are traveling with pets you could not do better.
Fabulous park great if you are travelling with your dog this park has dog friendly cabins and fenced caravan sites
Fantastic stay over the weekend at Big 4! Loved the heated spa and pool, a much welcomed relaxing time at the end of a day visiting the Ballarat Wildlife Park about 20 mins drive away.

Great van park.  Wide streets within the park make reversing onto site easy.  However sites are very close to each other.
Amenities are clean and well maintained.  Facilities are awesome.  Very close to shops.
Sadly it was freezing cold and rainy every day we were there so we didn’t explore Ballarat as much as we would have, but from what we did see, Ballarat is beautiful.  Worth a visit and would definitely recommend this park.
Stayed in a cabin. Staff were really friendly. Park is relaxing with a great atmosphere. One of the best we have stayed in.

It was a 1000% pet-friendly site if that is what you are looking for. The enclosed pond for pets was perfect. I stayed at the pet friendly site(I think it is all powered), and my friend's family stayed at the pet-friendly cabin. The site and cabin were fully fenced, and it was a nice feeling that your pet could walk around.
I can tell that they are upgrading equipment and the area. Even the public toilet and shower were super new.

Oh, KFC is really close by if you don't want to cook 😆
Good job, Ballarat team!

Absolutely loved staying here. We stayed on a pet site which was fully fenced. It made it easy and stress free and our dogs had freedom with room to move. The dog park has been well thought out and our 3 dogs loved it. The toilet and shower block is brand new, modern and lovely and clean. It even has the radio playing.
I did not rate the rooms as we didn’t stay in one or see inside. Others we spoke to that where staying in one said they where very nice.
Great park, sites were nice, amenities are very clean. Ruby at the reception was amazing and helped us with recommendations around Ballarat. 10/10. Will definitely be back 😊

I had stayed here just recently for 7 days and it was simply amazing.
The service and the staff were fantastic.
The cabin was neat and tidy and though I didn't use all the facilities (and amenities) offered, there was plenty on offer from the pool to the gym as well as play equipment for the tiny kids.
I will definitely be back!

What a wonderful, friendly park. Amazing facilities for pets too with a dedicated area for them to play, including wash facilities. Our dog loved the self-contained garden area at the back of the cabin as she sat and watched the rabbits hop by in the reserve. The pet-friendly cabins were really clean and had no pet smells, which was fantastic. Very comfortable king bed, clean linen and towels included and ample crockery and cooking equipment. Facilities were wonderful, beautiful swimming pool with a huge tv! Even a full ironing-board and iron set up in the laundry room. Such welcoming staff and a really friendly feel to the whole park. Very highly recommended, we had a wonderful stay.
This would have to be one the best pet friendly parks we have experienced.  Stayed 4 nights with the park and had a fantastic time. Well done to the team....

Our pet friendly site was fantastic. Level and easy access. Will be great to have new laundry up there amenities are excellent. Camp kitchen great just could do with full screen inclosure and heating for winter. Thankyou loved it 🥰

We stayed there for 3 days and had the best time. From the moment I entered reception area I was greeted by a lovely lady who had a wonderful smile. She was very helpful in every way. We had the best site ever, and our dog had a wonderful time. We were in one of their enclosures which allowed our dog to run around freely. The set up was wonderful and clean. We were also placed close to the amenities, as we had requested that. The park itself was clean and the camp kitchen and other facilities around were also clean and very user friendly. This is definitely one of our favorites and we would come back again. We have already recommended to our friends and family. The number of bins that are placed around the grounds is incredible. This place is very well thought out. Well done to all the staff that run this park and keep it clean. Thank you.

Called up for a powered site for our first caravan sojourn. My wife joined as a Big 4 member years ago and we now are reaping the rewards. Great price and we were able turn up and choose a site. Clearly it's not busy in the midst of winter. There a shopping centre and fast food outlets in close proximity. We learn a lot about our new caravan.
Very lovely and friendly place to spend your time recommend to anybody

Booked a fenced-in pet site  brilliant! Great facilities, even a fenced in water park for the dogs! Kids' play and games galore, we'll laid out  and a great park if you want to base yourself while exploring Victoria.
We stayed in a pet friendly cabin and the dog loved it. So did we! The off leash area has to be the best in the country.
Good for a overnight stop
I can't comment on rooms as we stayed in our caravan, we had an exceptional stay with our kids and dog, the facilities exceeded our expectations, everything was very clean.
One of the best dog friendly parks we've stayed in. Highly recommend this park.
Great park only a short drive into town, very clean and well presented. Cabins are roomy and clean. Staff are very helpful on check in, well kept and quiet park

Friendly staff, great park facilities.  Kids loved the pool & the go carts (very affordable).  Would love to come back next time with the doggo - dog facilities looked very impressive.

What really impressed me though which might be of interest to the group is that they have fully fenced sites that are suitable if you are travelling with dogs. Stayed 8 days in enclosed dog friendly site. Great site with Astro turf. Plenty of room for large van and tow vehicle. Great set up for dog to run free in its own yard. Also great lease free areas for dog.

We stayed for two nights, perfect spot as we were going to sovereign hill. Cabin was great and because we had our puppy with us we stayed in one of the dog friendly cabins. Great dog park! We were very lucky with the weather

Absolutely brilliant could ask for more stayed in cabin with our 2 dogs so comfortable and clean by far the best place to stay with your pets staff friendly and do a great job can’t fault it in anyway

We had such a fun stay at BIG4 Ballarat Windmill Park! Our cabin was small but spotless and perfect for our family – cozy, comfy, and had everything we needed. A kids heaven with the pedal carts, playground, and jumping pillow, and the indoor pool and spa were a big hit (super clean too!). The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, making us feel right at home. The whole park is beautifully maintained and has such a relaxing vibe. Best part? It’s dog-friendly – we’ll definitely be back with our furry friend next time!
Stayed on a powered site just for one night.. Amenities were really clean1 and even heated. Staff were super friendly and helpful

The accommodation was clean and the basic kitchen tools and appliances are complete. The amenities are awesome especially the spa. Kids loved the spa, karts, and the jumping pillow. We enjoyed our stay and we are looking to come back every year! Highly recommended. Did I mention how accommodating the staff were? Made sure we were settling beautifully at our accommodation. Thumbs up!

What a fantastic park! Great dog friendly area- having the fencing around is such a game changer and just makes it so easy! Fantastic dog friendly off leash area with pond - if others could clean up after there own pets we could probably have more things like this at other parks. We collected three dog poo bags full to the brim, shouldn’t be up to staff to clean up after your pets.
Amenities clean, great water pressure and heat, heated indoor pool and spa with a big screen tv - so many winning things at this park. Our dogs and I had a wonderful time and thank the team for providing a wonderful area. We will definitely be back.
great caravan park for relaxing and kicking back great location

Great place to stay, especially if you have children.
Spacious sites, with options for drive through sites,
Powered and unpowered.
Indoor HEATED pool with spa and a big screen for movie sessions in the pool. Tennis court, Basket ball court and out door playgrounds. Hire a go kart and enjoy the rest of
The park. The most amazing "Dog Friendly" van sites!!! Fully enclosed site with a fence and gate. I
Have never seen this in any park before. Clean and tidy, well presented and friendly
Accomodating staff. Thanks for an excellent stay

Beautiful park stayed on a dog friendly site which was 3/4 SGrass and was really clean
Had a good sunny spot and near the clean amenities. You had your driveway entrance as well as a gate which does help

Currently only 1 amenities building for all the park, which was very full. A second is being built but currently it's a fair hike from the far end of the park. Facilities for dogs A+.
The pool looks wonderful but it really needs to open earlier so swimmers can use it in the morning.
Nice quiet location very clean facilities
Had a powered site.

We used to be regulars when the kids were young, but haven't been to stay in about 10years. Had a lovely 3 night stay here. Great facilities, the heated pool was a big hit! Great little cabin, had everything we needed. Highly reccomend.
Great, quiet caravan park. Friendly staff. Lovely brand new amenities. Large indoor heated pool. Highly recommend this caravan park. We'll be back 👍

I’ve just returned from having a weekend at the Big 4 at Ballarat.Its a lovely Family friendly park.Plenty tokeep the family occupied.Not far from Mars stadium,and shopping centre across the rd.Definitely worth a stay.

We just returned from a wonderful stay at Windmill Ballarat! We stayed in a 3-bedroom Manna cabin which was spacious and very clean. All the bedrooms had plenty of room, comfy couches and good wifi. The park itself is so lovely, really tranquil and well looked after. The facilities were wonderful; our boys spent every day in the amazing large pool (plus 2 spas, toddlers pool, splash area and TV screen) - and yes the water is actually so warm, like a nice warm bath! They also loved the jumping pillow, playground and little indoor playground with traffic light game. Pedal bikes were also a hit and we ran out of time for the gym or games room! The staff are wonderful, probably the kindest I’ve dealt with both over the phone and in-person. Def one of our fav Big4s and we will be back!
Very happy with our stay. Pet friendly is very important to us. Couple of issues with our cabin, no fault of management and we’re handled professionally. We will return again.

Confusing pet friendly stay... Overall good, modern, clean cabins however as a pawrent, beware, you arrive to a page of rules, over 20+. While many are ok, who books and pays for a pet friendly cabin to be told they cant be on furniture or in bedrooms... Clearly nobody is going to agree to this as pets now a days are barely pets, they are family and who would tell Milo he cant sleep with dad!

We stayed in a dog caravan powered site and is was absolutely perfect, the facilities at the park, the staff and the amenities were all fantastic!

We will definitely be back here and have planned to make it a yearly trip. Thankyou so much for having us!

We had a great 3 nights at Ballarat Windmill! Kids loved the huge pool, playground area, games room, pedal go-karts and free DVD hire. Our cabin was spacious and clean. Staff at reception were very friendly and always happy to help. The park isn't in the centre of town but only a short drive away and there's a small shopping centre with a supermarket within walking distance.
Great park, we have stayed on multiple occasions! Fantastic large heated indoor pool, very friendly and helpful staff, very well priced gokart hire, the kids never want to leave!

We had a wonderful experience.  We stayed in a 3 bedroom cabin, that is very spacious and clean. Plenty of room for 4 adults and 4 children.
Lots to do at the park to entertain the children. Not too far to go to explore Ballarat.
Highly recommended.
One of the best parks I've been at if not the best , fenced pooch sites are top of the list and need to be more of them throughout OZ
Cleanest cabin we have ever stayed in at a Big 4. Staff were very kind & we loved the school holiday activities.

Fantastic park to stay out

Indoor pool

This is the best dog friendly park you will find in VIC.
It is quite small for a BIG4 but makes up for it with a lot of entertainment for the kids and family.

Stayed in a dog friendly cabin which was clean and tidy, the enclosure for the pup was great and our favorite part was the activities for the dogs! We could finally go somewhere where our dog was included in our holiday and she loved it.

Only downside, the games room and playgrounds are a little run down and most of the main games (pool table, foozball, air hockey) were broken.
Friendly staff but a somewhat tight and not flat powered site. Park map is not accurate right from the front entry.

Beautiful place to stay, very clean, noise restrictions after 10pm which is great for families with small kids, pet friendly so no need to leave your fur babies at home. Great clean amenities. Will definitely be going back to stay again. Highly recommend if you want a relaxing and peaceful holiday 😊

We have just returned from spending 8 nights at Big 4 Windmill during the school holidays. This was our first stay at this park and we were met by very friendly and helpful staff. We had booked one of the enclosed pet friendly sites and we only have one word….AMAZING!!!! The double gates open wide that you have no trouble reversing your van/trailer onto site and there is plenty of room for your car to be behind the gates too. The synthetic grass is lovely underfoot and it was nice to not have to deal with any dirt/dust. It was also great that you could then close the gates and let your pet roam free while you were setting up, no having to leave them on the lead attached to the van. We were a couple of doors down from the camp kitchen which has two unisex toilets, and a bit further walk to the main toilet/shower block but really not that far. They are building a new toilet/shower block in the pet area and once that is complete it will be great. You have a Woolworths and some specialty shops right across the road which was also very handy.
The only thing we can possibly say that was a downfall was trying to hammer our pegs into the ground. The ground was so hard!! But you can understand why it is hard with the base under the synthetic turf. Note to self take screw in pegs! It didn’t stop us from re-booking again before we left for same time next year. Also the off lead pet friendly area is awesome. There is a pond and big rocks and the dogs love running around in there making new friends. You can see the work that is being put into the pet area and once its all complete will be booked out for sure. Our son loved the indoor pool, basketball court and riding around on his bike making new friends. Highly recommend 😁

We stayed a week in one of the pet fenced sites for a week. The site was large and had astro turf which made everything feel cleaner and less dusty.
The fenced in site also made it feel like 'our space'
It's a great place to stay with easy walking distance to a new shipping centre and a bus route for a quick trip into town centre.
We loved our stay and will stay again.

A great doggy billabong for pets!
This was our first caravan adventure away with our new pup, and he loved the billabong and fenced sites!

Once the new amenities block is up and running this place will be amazing!

Excellent stay at the Ballarat windmill Big4. Sites were ample and had easy access for our 16ft Van. Great facilities and pool, you can see they've put a lot of effort into improvements and upgrades. Would 100% recommend as a short or long stay location, excellent for kids and adults.
Great family bathroom in amenities block too for those with little ones.

Fabulous park for families. Excellent facilities and the staff were amazing. We booked a site for our caravan. It’s just a real shame that they have a TV in the swimming area. Swimming is fun enough for kids. Making screens a big part of kids lives just isn’t necessary.
Awesome park. Great facilities and the staff were extremely friendly and helpful. Great for families. The pet section was fabulous. Amazing park, will definitely back!

We’ve stayed at multiple Big4’s in Aus and they’ve all been great. They’re obviously catered towards families which is totally fine by us, never been an issue. But this Big4 was insane.

So many safety issues - gym inaccessible the entire night as kids left to play on the equipment. Pool full (fair enough) but ‘adult’ spa also completely full of unattended kids.  Kids running across the roads and sites in the dark so we could barely get parked up. Blocked toilets, had to wait ages to get a shower.

No idea if it was an understaffing, or booked overcapacity, but it was chaos. We emailed to speak to them directly about it but head office said it wasn’t their responsibility, and the park never got back to us. Defo would not recommend for individuals, couples etc.

Very nice safe feeling park.  Has a pool and hot tub.
Spacious cabin.
Great site, plenty of things for the kids in holidays.
We stayed on a powered site. Facilities were very clean and great variety of activities for the kids to use. Customer service was brilliant and very helpful with any questions.
Had a great barbeque here, was a peaceful stay throughout at the Blue Bum cabins.
Very friendly staff especially Matt who went out of his way to make my stay incredible. Clean toilets and easy access.
Myself & my staffy Izzy loved this place. I wish more caravan parks were set up with freedom sites & a great off leash area with a pond. We will definitely be back

Stayed on a powered site. Amenities were all modern and immaculately clean. Great pet friendly sites and infrastructure. Walking distance to a shopping centre with restaurants and cafes etc as well as takeaway food. Friendly staff and other patrons.
Stayed for 1 night in the Swagman cabin. Was reasonably priced and clean. Air con. Nothing to fancy.  Good location. Will stay again

It was only our second trip with our caravan, and the staff were incredibly helpful, booking us into an easily accessible pet-friendly site that was fully fenced—perfect for our dog.

The facilities were clean and well-maintained, the pool was fantastic, and our kids had an amazing time. We highly recommend this park to anyone traveling with kids or dogs!

This caravan park is located not far from the main part of town. There’s a shopping centre just down the road. It’s very quiet and the amenities are spotless. There are some lovely gardens but you can see that they struggle to grow grass in some areas. They have an indoor swimming facility as well as an indoor play area for the children. There are chickens that you can feed your food scarps too as well.

Fantastic campground, garden well kept, nice plots.
Indoor swimmingpool with spa, everything clean and childproof.
Showers, toilets and campkitchen were awesome: realy clean and well kent, a delight to use. Good strong shower with hot water.
Very friendly staff, we recommand this park highly!

Had a great stay at Windmills Big 4 Holiday park.
We had a pet friendly site which was completely enclosed and safe to let our furry friend run about .he really enjoyed it . Also had a pet friendly run area out the back with water and rock for him to explore .
The park  was clean and tidy as were the amenities .Staff  were friendly as well .
Overall an great experience.

Fantastic park, pet friendly cabins are so spacious & clean, enclosed area for dogs outside. Great billabong pool area just for dogs and access to off leash areas.

Very nice Caravan Park. Good, clean facilities, handy location and very friendly and welcoming staff. Recommended.

Fenced pet friendly sites were terrific, park was clean and well presented. Will be returning again in the future.

We loved that we could have a fenced in site where we could bring in the car and caravan and our dogs could run around. My husband joked it would be great if you had small children becuase you knew they couldn't run off. If you are trailing with dogs, this is the best place.

Great clean amenities. Son had a blast with all the kid orientated choices. Across the road from a shopping centre. Good location for sovereign hill.

First time at this site and we were impressed.  It was a bit noisy with loud music and constant very loud voices until late and night. It’s was very good would go back.
Beautiful park, great atmosphere. Excellent facilities, OUTSTANDING customer service. Best budget cabin we have ever had and great selection of van sites. Would love to return again. Thank you!
Well maintained holiday park, perfect for families. Safe and secure. Will be back!

We stayed for 2 nights with our dog at one of the fenced camp sites. Our experience has been wonderful. It’s a nice and well maintained park with lot’s of amenities including a pond enclosure for dogs. Our whole family had a blast! We will be back ☺️

We love coming to this place it's so good.My teenagers love it. The powered site we used was easy to find, easy to set up and close to camp facilities and services. The reception staff were lovely and friendly. Would recommend!

We stayed at the windmill over new years for 8 nights in one of the Banksia cabins. The cabin was clean and tidy while a little dated it had everything we needed.

We were so impressed with Big4 Ballarat. We had a powered caravan site, with a concrete pad. It was perfect for what we needed, under some trees, not far from the pool and the facilities.

The staff were friendly and thorough and we would totally stay again!
Beautiful park. We love staying here. The staff are so friendly and accommodating. Facilities are amazing! We will be back!
Last minute stop in for 2 nights. What you’d expect from big 4 but the family running it are great!!

highly recommend that this campsite reconsider allowing dogs, especially in areas where children are playing. During my stay, I saw two dogs with their mouths tied, and they appeared aggressive. Although I avoided making eye contact with them, they still seemed to focus on me in an unsettling way. This raises serious concerns about safety, particularly for children who are running around and might unknowingly provoke such dogs.

While I appreciate pet-friendly policies, the safety of families and kids should be the top priority. I strongly suggest implementing stricter rules or even restricting dogs in areas where kids are present to prevent any potential accidents or attacks in the future.”

One of the best places we have stayed at. Minus the pillows. But anyway. The room was great. The bed was good. Loved staying here the trees over the cabins makes it feel cosy. And they have a chicken coop and area where u can go and give them scraps. So cool. The mozzies can be bad there when it's warm. The pool was amazing. Such a beautiful warm pool. The bathrooms were a bit hard but that's okay. Great location too just out of town but close to woolies and other shops. And menu log delivers there. Was a good stay and we will be back soon.
Staff were absolutely lovely and understand genuine customer service, amenities were clean and the park was genuinely serviced for families.

We were so amazed at this caravan park we booked it for the dog pond area and the fenced pet sites. There were so many extra surprises that we couldn’t believe.
I. The indoor heated pool with 2 spas and 2 huge TVs open till 9pm! We’ve never seen this before it was amazing!
2. The free hydro dog bath with warm water , so after the dogs have had a play in the fully off lead area with swimming ponds , rocks to climb and a nice bench seat for you to sit and relax you can then take them right out the gate to the hydro bath!
3. The wetlands walk just outside the gate! Beautiful boardwalk for a nice sunset walk.
4. Bouncy pillow, indoor play area, outdoor play area, and again that amazing pool!
5. Very clean well thought out amenities.
6. The dogs were so happy in their large fenced pet site, there’s Astro turf , pebbles plus a little tree with some dirt for them to wee and poo on. The added bonus was you can leave them there while you go and do sovereign hill or have a swim in the pool so long as they aren’t stressed or bark too much. The lovely, helpful and very friendly reception staff checked on them throughout the day and they were absolutely fine!
7. Your aren’t squashed in next to everyone else all the sites are spacious and there’s beautiful gardens throughout the park.
Long review but this park deserves it!
Thanks for having us !

A well appointed Holiday Park with very friendly, helpful staff, who go out of their way to assist with your requirements. The park is a little way out of central Ballarat but a small shopping centre very close by with supermarket, and several food outlets.  We have stayed here several times and the cabins are very clean with lots of cooking utensils, oven/cooktop & microwave. Walkin shower is great. There is lots of things for kids to do - jumping castle, go-carts, scooters, and for all ages an indoor pool. There is also recreation room with pool table and  table tennis table. BBQ’s situated around park, and large room you can book for large groups. If you have a dog this park is perfect for you with fenced caravan sites and dog friendly cabins. There is a special dog area for them to play - check it out as it is amazing!
My family have been having a get together here each year and have enjoyed our time here each time.
I would certainly recommend  this park for your next break.
great place to stay, lots to do with kids if you got them, nice clean cabin, relaxing environment, friendly staff.

Wow!! What can I say. From the time I rang to make the booking till the time I said goodbye, service was A1.
The best pet friendly park we have ever stayed at. Plenty of space in our fenced area, great play area for our furry child. Great walk around the wetlands. Workmen in the developing pet area were very caring checking we were not being disturbed.  We will be back, along with those in NSW and Qld we have told. Wonderful activities for young and not so young.  Congratulations team.

to small crowded in like sardines, noisy cars flying up and down main road all night.

Stayed here over Melbourne cup long weekend and what an amazing place it was the staff were all fabulous to deal with Sam was an absolute gem and an asset to the business nothing was a bother for him. We are from WA and have been on the road 8 mths we have stayed in many parks and we have found this park second to none if you are travelling with a pet this park is a must as the facilities for all and your pet are absolutely unreal the hosts are extremely friendly and very helpful in all matters of your stay once again thank you

Cabins are reasonable size with lots of parking but could do with a bit of an update, great park for families with kids as lots of things to do.  Reception has a few snack items, soft drinks and alcohol but no supermarket basics like milk, butter, oil etc.  there is a supermarket a few minutes drive away.

Fantastic Caravan Park.  Great set up and the lagoon for our dog was an added bonus. Very friendly owners. Would definitely like to come again.
John, Corinne and Gypsy  Marshall

We had a lovely time at BIG4 Ballarat Windmill Holiday Park with our two large dogs booked into a pet-friendly site.  It was our first time camping with our pets and it was a great success due to the peace of mind and security offered by our fenced site.  Our friendly big dog who is 32kg was quite happy to rest his front paws on the 1200mm high fencing to say hello to passers-by.

As the fencing is quite transparent the caravan park is not suited to reactive dogs that are going to bark whenever they see another dog or person. The other camping dogs were all well behaved during our stay and our immediate neighbours dogs were well mannered.

The highlight for us was the fenced and secure doggy play park with a delightful "billabong" which was clean and lovely for the dogs to play in. Access is restricted to dog/s from one site at a time so it is not like an off-leash doggy play park with uncontrolled strange dogs.

At the end of the day, it is a clean, well-managed caravan park with excellent facilities, and we will probably visit annually for a safe, fun doggy holiday. Our neighbours had visited 10 times! I wish more caravan parks around Australia had dog friendly features.

Stayed here recently on our lap around OZ. After 16 weeks on the road this has to be one of our best stops. The Dog  Friendly sites are great. Well secured and easy to keep clean. The Dog Run with its own Billabong was truly appreciated not only by us, but also by our 2 yr old Border Collie. And one of the few parks who allows dogs up near the camp kitchen was a bonus.
The location was great, facilities amazing and staff all welcoming and approachable.
Thanks for a Fabulous 4 days stay. I wish more parks had your philosophy ❤️❤️

We had a powered site which was excellent.  The staff were so friendly and helpful. The amenities and laundry were spotless and in brilliant condition. Overall we had a great 3 nights there and would highly recommend the Windmill.

During our recent stay we had to extend our stay numerous times, the staff went out of their way to accommodate us every time. We could not fault this park in anyway. The ammenities were spotless, the grounds were beautifully maintained and the staff so eager to make our stay as enjoyable as possible. Will definitely be recommending this park to everyone.
Great location, very friendly staff (spoke to both Eli and Sam), very clean caravan park.  We stayed here twice and couldn't fault it each visit.

This park is amazing!!! We stayed for a night last week on our way over to Phillip Island, and can easily say both humans and pups had the best time!
This park has thought of all guests (whether travelling with pets or not). We found the layout amazing, whilst the park is accessible to walk your dog around the entire park, the layout for those travelling with pets is sectioned off to those travelling without making the stay for all guests comfortable and not awkward to explain any normal pet behaviour and any “dog communication methods”.
The cabin we stayed in was pristine with excellent amenities, and camp sites fully fenced and very spacious to allow your pet to take run of your site space without being tangled with tethers, etc.
In addition the exclusive “BigPaw Billabong” dog park was a hit, compete with a dog bath for those who have a little too much fun!!!
We’re excited to return and spend more time here, their currently finalising construction of the “pet zone” to make more room for people travelling with pets!!!
