Beautiful ❤️ friendly ❤️ great place to stay, all the things they have here outstanding. Thank you. 🌟🌟🌟🌟

Fantastic place to stay, family and pet friendly. All.the staff have been fantastic and are more than willing to help out when you have a query.
It has an indoor heated pool, tennis court, BBQ areas, dog park, games room and lots of outdoor recreational activities for the kids (even the big kids) to have some fun.
This also has a fair sized function room so you can hold a family or business function with the convience of being only a short walk to the local shops and local wetlands, not to mention that Lake Wendouree is only a 10 minute drive.

I highly advise this Family run Caravan park with its cleanliness, friendly staff, continuous improvement to cater to everyone.
Great location and friendly service, definitely will be back again

We recently stayed here and enjoyed every part. Although I’m not a dog person to see families have fun holidays with their pets was very nice to see. Staff extremely helpful. Close to food outlets and supermarkets. Cafes etc. would highly recommend.
Lovely staff, clean rooms, great facilities, we will be back.
LOVED this place! Its the perfect place for dog lovers and their pooches.

We stayed on a Pet Site (fenced area for us and the dog) and it was excellent. The freedom of being able to have your dog there and not tied up and getting wrapped around everything was fantastic. The fencing was very secure and a great addition to such a great park. The facilities were very clean. And I can't rave enough about all the activities and facilities this place has to offer. Indoor heated pool and spa area, tennis court, basketball, jump pillow and playground, billabong for the dogs, recreation room. Not only that but they had a kids activities program (kids club, movie night, colouring comps) so they actually interact with the people staying at the park! But one of the best things they've ensured at Ballarat Windmill was customer service. Always happy to help (especially kids) and they even walk you to your site when you check in to make sure you're comfortable! That was over and above. Then they also have regular visitors to the park (Luigis icecream, donut cart etc) Always something to look forward to. We were so happy, we booked in for Xmas while we were there!! Thanks Matt, Ruby, Sam for a great stay!

The indoor heated pool is great and a real draw card. If you have a dog the fenced powered site area is awesome. The shower block has been updated and clean. The camp kitchen (one of the worst) and games room is in desperate need of a renovation.  $116 a night for  2A 2C for a powered site is the most we have ever paid and we had a dirt site. Looks like outside of school holidays its $75 per night.

What a wonderful place. The staff are exceptional and made our stay over Grand Final weekend so much fun. The kids had so much to do we didn’t need to leave the park. Great location with Woolworths and take away options right across the road. Would highly recommend
A great family friendly park that has great inclusions for your furry family members too!

What a wonderful caravan park! Sam and all the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, and the facilities were immaculate. The secure grounds were easy to access, and the amenities were fantastic. We had a great time, and the cabins were clean and well-maintained. Would highly recommend staying here if coming to Ballarat.
A great place to stay.  The staff go over and above to be helpful and accomodating.  Well done team.
Great client service for customers on arrival. The park is in a good location. Caters for people with fur babies (special fenced sites. Great indoor pool.

Staff where absolutely amazing and so accommodating after a family emergency left me on my own with our 24ft van and 2 kids, nothing was to much trouble from giving me back to back sites so I could just drive the van through and late check outs (not knowing what time we would be able to get away) I can not thank them all enough for how amazing they where for the 2days we stayed. And the heated pool and spa area was so amazing to help me switch off in the evening 😍 Could not recommend this park more.

Fantastic park!!!

We loved the games room which is full of stuff for entertaining the little ones.

There is also a basketball court, a tennis court, jumping pillow…. And our favourite - the 25 meter indoor swimming pool!
It has 2 spas, a wading pool and a splash area for kids. It was also toasty and warm in the pool area in the middle of winter.

The staff are SUPER friendly and there is a lovely atmosphere at this park. If you’re passing through Ballarat, THIS is the place to stay!

Totally thought through and welcoming of all. Amazing facilities from fenced pet sites, indoor pool and spa, gym down to showers facing the right way to minimize water seepage to the very generous and comfortable outer chamber of the  cubicle. The floor squidgy (instead of a mop and bucket) - simple and brilliantly functional! Even camp kitchen, great kids area at front and pet facilities at rear of site including cabins with fenced deck and back grassed area AND a Doggy Billabong! For a cooling swim. Totally impressed at the thoughtfulness and smart operation throughout down to friendly signs  reflecting the welcoming inclusive respectful culture. The pet sites and cabins are in expansion so there’s definitely a market for them that this place is set to capitalize on while servicing - smart business. Never thought we’d be Big4 people but here we are / at the best holiday park we’ve been to yet!

We chose BIG4 Ballarat Windmill Holiday Park as a trial run with our new motorhome and two dogs due to its great reputation and pet friendliness. What a great experience!  The lady on the front desk was super friendly, advising on walks for the dogs. We were allocated a large, enclosed pet site which was easy to reverse in to and artificially turfed so great for letting the dogs out to run around. The shower and toilet facilities were obviously newly fitted-out inside, heated, well ventilated and spotlessly clean. Being dog friendly we expected some noise at night but it was extremely quiet and peaceful.  We met one of the managers, Sam who was also delightful and couldn’t have been more helpful for us newbies. Ballarat has plenty of things to do, great walks with the dogs and the park is right beside Mullawallah Wetlands which has amazing birdlife. Overall, such a great positive experience, we wish all parks could be like this!

Pet Friendly cabin was lovely seems fairly new and smelt very clean -  coming into a warm cabin was lovely as the heater was on. The king bed was rock hard and so uncomfortable to sleep on in the main room with the bunk beds VERY noisy and the top rails very dangerous - not secured and on a 45 degree angle in the 2nd room. Lollie wrappers under bunk. ||Bathroom gels provided - one was filled with water or cleaners didn’t check. The floor appeared to be not wiped out with previous animal hair bow on floor and general hair. ||If your looking for pet friendly - I give this big 4 a 10/10 for accommodating pets in cabins and the caravan sites looked amazing!
Great place to stay. Super friendly staff. Our stay was super comfortable even though it got down to -2 over night, the heated bathrooms were awesome! Highly recommended

WOW what can we say, this place is fantastic!  Very welcoming & friendly service from ALL the staff. Great facilities including camp kitchen, heated clean bathrooms, laundry room etc and currently working on more within the park like another ablution block, additional pet friendly sites (which are the best we have stayed in), new fabulous enclosed pet friendly cabins and another pet friendly rec room … there is also a big paws dog billabong for the pups to swim in and explore…our girls both loved it!
Close to everything, great walks from the park and so many suggestions from staff to do around the place with our doggos.
Thank you all for making our stay sensational and we will definately be back soon as so much more to do and see!
The cabins are beautiful and new looking. My dogs had a ball there. Best off leash rock pool area I've ever seen. I recommend it to everyone on FB pages for pple who travel with their dogs
The staff was very helpful and friendly. It's a great family-friendly park with lots for the kids to do and keep them occupied.
Very friendly service, the bathrooms are toasty warm, very clean, a  great family park.

We stayed in July and the heated pool and spa were definitely the main reason we chose windmill. The indoor pool area was great for the kids on a rainy day. The facilities were great for the kids, rec room and basketball court were popular and kept them happy. Rooms were comfortable and spacious, met our needs for an overnight stay. The staff customer service was exceptional!

We stayed for 2 nights during some rainy and cold weather but the fabulous indoor pool complex with 2 heated spas made the cold melt away. The complex has a large inbuilt TV screen and one shower room and is very clean and well maintained.
The reception staff were very friendy and helpful. Sam even agreed to up the temperature on the spa for us which made for one very hot spa. Thanks Sam. 😊🙏
We travel with our two small dogs, so we had a Big Paw powered site. It was very large and fully fenced which meant we could let the dogs run around outside our motorhome, knowing they were safe.
There’s also an amazing dog pond for the pups to explore with a running stream and lovely walk-in swimming pool for them. If you want dog friendly, you can’t go past these sites.
We would definitely come back.
Sam and ruby were very helpfull and accommodating,very clean facilities

Had our families stay in cabins and caravan sites here and we all had a ball, The kids of all ages enjoyed themselves and the adults did too, Games room was a big hit across all and the go karts , Staff were absolutely lovely and accomodating to all needs. we loved our stay !
Warm, welcoming and helpful staff. Easy access, secure grounds, great facilities.  We enjoyed our time here.

So rather than write this review while still angry I decided to hold off and see how I felt after some time to think. As a regular traveler across Australia both for business and holiday so I have stayed in dozens and dozens of caravan parks and holiday park from the budget end of town to the more expensive so I feel I am well positioned to comment.
Let’s start with the check in, greeted by a very happy friendly young person with their pronouns he/him proudly displayed on their top, respectfully I obliged when speaking to them, however in the same conversation I was referred to as “mate”. No real drama but I think you get my point. Continuing on I was asked if I had any pets I said “yes a small dog who stays inside the van or is with us on lead at all times . I was then advised the site would be $65 (a bit rich I thought for the back blocks of Ballarat with no view or aspect and the opposite end of the park from the facilities.) I was handed a page long waiver to sign of all the things our dog could or couldn’t do , vaccinations it had to have etc which I dutifully signed.
The site, a fenced, caged ?? area large enough for our motorhome partly covered in fake grass the rest a muddy /stony area with a sliding gate and personal gate.Ok I see where the $65 comes from but totally unnecessary. The pen next to us had another van parked in it but appeared to be empty and two or three days worth of dog’s droppings sitting near the fence. Whilst driving in the the site a fox terrier was running around the camp with no one in particular in charge of the dog but it did appear to belong to one of the workers or owners, the very same dog who as I was driving out the gate wandered into a garden bed next to a cabin and dropped its business with a worker in a golf cart shrugging his shoulders and driving on.
Our night started out with an unattended dog in a cabin barking non stop for a couple of hours from about 4pm until about 6 when the owners returned and it was silent immediately, a little later in the evening the dog started barking again and after around another 2 hours of non stop barking I rang the 1800 number offered to me at check in however this was only an answering machine to leave a message until business hours or go through to an emergency number. I didn’t consider it an emergency so I chose initially to just see if the dog stopped, sadly it didn’t so I rang back to the emergency number and a gentleman agreed to come out and check and to contact the owners to return to the cabin. Turns out the dog wasn’t supposed to be in the cabin for starters and the occupants were gone by morning.
Now to the facilities, According to my wife the main shower block at the opposite end of the park were excellent however two toilets offered for us to use close to our camp and part of the camp kitchen were absolutely disgusting. Caked on urine that had clearly been there for days all over the underside of the toilet seat, stale urine in the bowl etc.
So to sum up $65 to stay in a pen we didn’t need , rules about our dogs behaviour not only being ignored by staff for their own dog and to have a dog bark for 4 hours 2 of which daytime staff were on duty but seemingly oblivious to was all a bit rich , we won’t be back and certainly won’t be suggesting it as a spot to stay.

Pool needs major updating- like it’s almost unsafe. And not properly maintained or probably legal if it was built
now. Apart from that it’s a great park and cabin vacay spot. Just needs some infrastructure upheaval TBH

Great location out of the busy town! Close to shops (Woolworths and takeaway places)
Love the indoor pool
One Of The Best Caravan Parks In Australia!
Had a great time here, great activities and facilities

Staff were amazing and so helpful.
Kids had a great time.
We loved staying here. It was great having access to the toasty warm pool and spa as well as many other activities. The cabin was clean and well set up for our family of 5.

This an absolute gem of a park. Friendly and accommodating staff at check in, well kept grounds, level sites, heated amenities, many recreational possibilities. including an indoor heated pool. Very close to shops and just a few minutes straight down the highway into town and even closer to Wendouree Village. It will be our stay of choice when visiting B'rat.
We stayed in one of the cabins, which was comfortable and clean. Decor was a little dated but the cabin reasonably priced.

About 5 km out of town but is in a nice quiet setting. Wide access roads, lovely gardens with lots of trees for shade all well kept. Helpful friendly staff. Heaps of amenities - kids play area including an enclosed covered area, small gym, tennis court. Toilet/shower block modern and exceptionally clean. Large heated indoor pool and spa with giant TV on the wall. We stayed in the dog area at the back. There are dog friendly cabins. We were in a fully fenced dog friendly van site so the doggos could roam free. There is a fantastic billabong area for doggos, fully fenced with rocks waterfalls and heaps of running space. The camp kitchen is dog friendly down one end. I think this is a well appointed van park I would certainly recommend to anyone coming to Ballarat

Just spent a wk at this park in the Big Paws section.
This is not our first time here and won't be our last.
Sam the Manager  is such a beautiful,  caring man who goes about his day trying to look after everybody's needs.
They are putting fake turf on all the dog areas and it looks absolutely amazing.
All the staff there are so friendly and the lovely  touch of beautiful  warm ablution blocks when you walk in there in this cold weather.
And the dog run area is next level.
Keep the excellent work everyone..
Loved the stay there..
Shazz kev and Trapper
Great stay over . Great view from the cabin and we had our dogs with us. Great place to stay .

The indoor pool and spas were a bonus for us as it was 6° and we were able to enjoy these facilities, tennis courts, fully equipped gym and the fact the toilets and showers are separated with heaps of room and a bench to keep your clothes dry is a big plus ! It’s the best caravan park we’ve ever stayed at! Staff are friendly and helpful! We will definitely be back

We just left after a week long stay here, unfortunately our experience was very disappointing. We arrived 1 1/2 hours AFTER check in time and our cabin was not ready so we had to wait for them to go clean the cabin before we could check in, upon check in I noticed that the cabin I specifically booked as it said included dog bowls and dog toys had no toys and only a bowl in the outside area that was completely mouldy so couldn’t be used. Thankfully there was a PETstock nearby so I could go buy the necessary supplies. The small outdoor area connected to our cabin had a lot of dog poo in it from the past guests. I must say the cabin was nice but don’t expect to be able to cook for a family (the cabin sleeps 5) as the pots are only big enough to hold a cup or two of water. One spa is out of order and full of green water and the other spa was nice on the first night but following nights it was freezing and couldn’t be used. Also note…..There are NO DOG WASH facilities here despite it clearly being advertised on their website and on the big 4 booking page. So if your doggy swims whilst in the leash free area be prepared to put a soggy doggy in the car and drive to a pet shop with a bath as your doggy will need a wash. When I asked about it I was told ‘oh it should be done in about 6 months or so’ I asked why it didn’t say that on the booking sites and I was told ‘it should, sorry’
During our stay they were doing some new fencing and ground leveling which meant right outside our cabin was huge mounds of mud/clay and as the equipment was used to move it, it ended up everywhere and stuck to shoes and doggy paws making everything messy.
They have a very strict no dogs off lead in the park other than in the dog area which I think is amazing however there was a small dog wondering around the park off lead all the time who was owned by someone connected to the park. Pretty frustrating as it set all the other dogs off by barking at them.
Overall when issues were brought up to staff I was told ‘yeah sorry’ ‘oh that’s not good’ or ‘we will rectify that’ of which didn’t happen. Overall a very average stay, I’ve stayed in countless big 4 parks and never ever left a bad review but this one absolutely does not live up to the normal big 4 holiday park expectations.
Caravan on a pet sites. Magnificent for no worry dog vacation

Congratulations on presenting such as clean park and wonderful facilities including heated indoor pool and spas, gym playgrounds etc.  The heated amenities block was very clean and well maintained Even though we don’t have a dog was so impressed with the sites offered with enclosed fencing for pets. Also liked the lovely landscaped water feature enclosed for pets.
Great value for money. 10/10 from me

Stayed one night in a pet friendly cabin. Very fresh and clean, with a small dog run out the back. Lovely big cabin with a queen sized bed in one room and four bunks in another.

Dog absolutely loved it.
We we go back to Ballarat, we will deffently stay here again. The indoor heated pool is what attracted me in the first place. There are plenty of activities for adults and children to be entertained.

This CP is a real gem. Super clean and modern amenities, really friendly and helpful staff, drive thru sites for overnighters and amazing facilities for those with pets with individual compounds that can house your van, tug and have plenty of space for your pet to run around in. The indoor pool and play facilities will also be a real hit for families.

We stayed here back in February 2024 on a pet friendly powered site with our swag. The facilities are incredibly clean, staff very friendly and helpful plus the off leash dog billabong area is an awesome facility to have! We loved staying here so much that we came back recently with friends and stayed in pet friendly cabins. The cabins are great and have a little fenced yard for the dogs.

Very friendly staff.
Great outside play area. Couldn’t get our toddler off the jumping pillow!
Didn’t use the pool but looked clean and tidy.
Games rooms with tables chairs, couches, TV, warm fire. TVs with PlayStations.
Kitchen is small and a bit dated but fully functional with a gas stove top, oven, and bbq hot plate. Some cleaning supplies provided such as dish liquid and scrub cloths.

Bathrooms clean and tidy. Seperate toilet and bathroom rooms which is nice.

We stayed in our camper so can’t comment on the cabins.

We recently stay for 2 nights and we're so cozy we're were definitely thinking of staying for another! The indoor pool was perfect, plenty of play equipment for our kids, a kids club and tennis and basketball court. Our toddler loved the chickens. The cabin was clean and very warm. The camp kitchen was very convenient and the rec room. The service was exceptional and welcoming and we really appreciated Matt giving us a map to see all the Ballarat activities. We will definitely be back!

The staff went above and beyond at all points of contact. Super helpful when booking. Then when I had to change from a van to a cabin last minute, Eli could not have been more supportive. When our heater was not working, the maintenance man was there to fix it straight away. We had a wonderful stay and really appreciate the exceptional customer service. Thank you! 😄
We stayed in the pet friendly sites and love it. It has its own enclosure so Loki doesn't have to stay on his lead.

Unable to get one night cabin for Saturday 27/04/2024. Only booking 3 night stay because this Saturday as long weekend! Disappointed as I was only wanting one night stay. Worried now for future caravans trips due to this policy. Disappointed!

Stayed here with my furbaby, very dog friendly!!

I cant recommend this caravan park more. The stand-out feature here is the staff. Never before have I stayed at a caravan park with such helpful and friendly staff.

A huge shout out to Eli...he made an amazing effort to switch my site accommodation on my last night to cabin due to bad weather. He made it all happen with ease.

Thank you to all the staff!! Love this place!
Great place to either base yourself at or to just relax. Will be back

Bed was to firm for us but the park was great we had a pet cabin which was great separate area to put your pet outside that is safe from other pets plus gave you time to unload your bags before you let your pet inside the cabin.pets not aloud on beds which is reasonably.
A great place to stay kids live it . Awesome atmosphere.

Excellent family-friendly van Park. Well appointed cabins, dog-friendly van yards and plenty of space to move around, even for those with larger Vans.
The play equipment, massive jumping pillow and indoor pools were a big hit with our 7 year old. Little peddle go-karts too available for hire and a good gaming room and hall for activities.
Close enough to town for a short drive in to attractions, and there's a Woolworths and small shopping plaza with a couple of nice cafes and takeaways within a short walking distance in Lucas.
Park has chickens too for the kids to feed, which was a bit of a novelty. Electric scooters appear to be available with Neuron too, if you have the app. There were a couple near the front gate each day.

Great place to stay even when cold with indoor pool and spa. Very nice staff and amazingly clean grounds. Perfect for a get away with family. Favourite thing was the dog pond area, being able to let you 4 legged family member have a great run around with out ha ing to be on a lead.

What an amazing caravan park. All staff especially Sam and Eli have gone above and beyond on helping me in a situation that meant I needed to stay for an extended stay. They went above any expectations I had. The facilities are awesome. We stayed in a pet friendly cabin and it was amazing. The dog billabong is awesome. My Great Dane loved going there daily. Thank you Sam and staff you are all amazing and we will be back!!!

Clean facilities and lovely environment. Good staff.
My cabin and a friend’s cabins were not able to contain our small and medium sized dogs. Very poor makeshift enclosures behind the cabins.  We had to chain  our dogs up and friend sent hers home.  Also a party of 6 only had one two-seater couch in the sitting area.

We stayed in one of the Dog friendly sites for 6 nights, we also where luck enough to have one with the fake grass, so no dust it was great,and loved it, so much to do at the park, and even furbaby had a great time in the Lagon.  We can't wait to go back.

Great park. Friendly and professional staff. Loved the pool and gym. Good amenities. Will happily recommend to others.
Robert and Glennys

We were a family of 4 including teenagers staying an en-suite site. Facilities were great especially the games room with pool table, air hockey and table tennis. We made use of the pool and spas. If we stayed longer we would have had a hit of tennis. It was a nice quiet park with a cozy feel. Staff were amazing with excellent knowledge of public transport to get us in to Melbourne.
The cabin we had was very small could not get dressed in bedroom, shower good,can't say much else except i would not go back.
Big4 Holiday park is good if you have caravan but with Tent is very limited and sandy.

$45 for a powered site is great value with the facilities on offer. Spent 2 seperate nights here and all the facilities where clean and well supplied. The pool and spa with the tv where nice to escape the heat. All staff were a credit to the company.
Great place to stay,indoor heated pool is a bonus.

It was our first time taking our new caravan away and all I can say is this park was wonderful. We have 2 dogs so we booked one of the fenced sites and luckily enough for us we got the “test site” with the artificial grass. The off leash area at the back of the park was sensational and our German Shepherds had a ball. We won’t hesitate in coming back 😊

Loved our stay here. Had a pet friendly cabin that had a deck and a dog run fully fenced so pooch didn't have to stay on a lead. Campsite also had a dog pond, again fenced, billabong to swim in and a babbling stream and rocks to play and climb over.
Absolutely loved it.

This is the friendliest dog friendly caravan park we have ever been to. Mind you we are avid campers and have been to many caravan parks over the years. How smart the design is for powered sites? Dog owners are seperate to the rest of the guests. But all have enclosed spaces for dogs to run around. Big sites with plenty of room for a large van and a car. Plenty for kids to do as well. Can’t beat the indoor heated pool with two spas. Plus side it’s open until 9pm so you don’t have to rush out when on holidays. Wonderful place for those who want to explore Ballarat anytime of year. Well done to the owners who run the place, you are doing amazing work. We will be back.

Loved every minute!
Few minor issues (bird poo covering balloon trampoline, crickets in the pools we removed, indoor play area equipment out of use) otherwise brilliant.
Clean toilets, amazing shower, great kids room & prime location!

Great park especially for dog owners.Large enclosed dog areas to park van in and be confident your dog can run free in the secure area. Great leash free area with pools and bushy area for dogs to explore (one dog family at a time). Dog wash being installed. Well done.
Best dog friendly park I've ever come across. Very clean. Lovely people.

We were looking for a site for Friday night and are so glad they found room for us. Sam bent over backwards to make sure we were setup and happy. What a wonderful park. Need to go back for a longer stay to try out all the facilities. Wonderfully dog friendly with fenced sites for those travelling with their furries.
Best caravan park ive been to Love to easy park at your cabin. An the pool is a great way to cool off. Also the reception ate great people an always willing to help

Have never been to a pet friendly caravan park where the pet sites were individually fenced off.  Many so called "pet friendly" park owners should visit the Ballarat Windmill site.  This has to be the gold standard pet friendly site that we have stayed at.

The staff were amazing, polite and very helpful, the shower was amazing but the floor (which was supposed to be white was brown ) it was disgusting and I wish I had the time to clean just one strip in the middle 🤢 lots of mossies too so take your mossie spray
An amazing dog friendly park.  Heaps for kids, facilities were very clean , park very tidy in the midst of peak season ! Highly recommended.
Unfortunately this is not a smoke free park. The dog friendly pens abut the 'normal' camp areas and dogs bark and fight through the fences all day/night.

Will be going back on our next Sovereign hill and kryal castle trip, close to goldrush mini golf as well  - best pool ever!! Kids were in it everyday.....jumping pillow, playground, kids club and movie every night in holidays , small gym and great games room 😀

We visited in November 2023 with a group of friends. We stayed across a range of campsites, pet friendly camp site and cabins. We had kids, dogs, and lots of adults. The staff were ridiculously friendly and accommodating and the facilities were exactly as described. We are in the process of booking our group in again. Highly recommend. We personally stayed in the pet friendly section and it was AMAZING! The off lead area was great and the site gave us so much freedom with our dogs. All other dog owners were super friendly too.

We had the fenced camping area for dogs but it was very handy for our toddler grandson as we got to relax without fear of him running off , best idea and has a dog splash play area loved it pet friendly and family friendly 😀  definitely going back and friends want to come with us , also lovely friendly staff 💞
We enjoyed our stay at the park and especially the heated pool and spa facilities.  We received the friendliest service of any park we have visited this trip.
We had horrible weather in Ballarat. Thank goodness we could enjoy the hot spa at this place. A great park.

Stayed 3 nights on a powered site. Really, a great park to stay at especially if you've got kids. It's big and spacious all round with well kept facilities. RV sites were also good. Staff were very friendly and accommodating-always happy. Lots of families with kids during our stay so kids had a blast on the jumping pillow and the indoor pool.

This park caters to every family member - pets included. They take “pet friendly” to a whole new level with their pet sites which are fully fenced (also great for toddlers!) so your doggo can roam off leash around your camper. They also have pet friendly cabins where they can sleep indoors with you. Then there is the fully fenced dog park with rocks to climb on, creek and pond for them to swim in and keep cool. It’s so beautiful.
For the kids - there is an indoor pool, spas, splash pad, playground, pedal karts, toddler playground, games room equipped with PlayStations, a school holiday program with planned activities including a kids club. There’s no excuse to be bored!
The facilities are wonderful and well kept. There is even a family bathroom with open shower, deep bathtub, shallow sink (for newborns).
Absolutely will go back for another stay.

If I could give six stars I would. Sam and staff were amazing 👏.  If you want to take your dog on holidays this is the place to go. The dog lagoon was awesome 👌 In all fantastic place for families with great facilities. Would highly recommend!!

We had a great time at Big 4 Cardigan! The pool is awesome and our kids loved the chickens and go karts. The staff are doing such an awesome job, in person and on the phone! Nothing is too hard. They are so helpful, friendly and all round wonderful!
We stayed 2 nights and loved it we had a powered site which was nice and shady. Fantastic and friendly staff nothing is too much trouble. Highly recommend staying here plenty for everyone to enjoy
Great place to visit. All the staff were very friendly and nothing was ever a hassle. Cabins were exceptionally clean and the grounds were immaculate. Can't recommend highly enough.
Excellent Park always things to do

Staff are very friendly and accommodating.  Great clean facilities. The kids loved the activities that were put on eg kids club and the extra stuff for New years.
Convenient to have shops pretty much across the road.
Stayed at Big 4 for two nights and had an amazing experience. All the staff were really helpful and made my time at Big 4 a whole lot better.
Great park and friendly staff.

I can't fault our experience here. We travel once a year as a big group, and this has been one of the most family friendly experiences we have had.

Our son injured himself and the care from Sam was amazing, checking in on him.

Kids club was a massive hit, for all the kids, but particularly for our 6 year old daughter who has claimed Eli as her best friend and she didn't want to leave Ballarat. We'd love to come back again.

Beautiful little park. All of the facilities are clean and well maintained. Great indoor pool with a massive bug screen tv. Heaps for the kids to do. And the staff… the staff were all AMAZING. So friendly, helpful and so kind to us and the kids. Definitely recommend. Thanks for having us.

Brilliant park. Clean, great ammenities.
Huge TV in the indoor heated pool area playing the test cricket.
Also the staff are so friendly and helpful, going way above and beyond.  I had a broken tv cable and they even gave me their own to test it.
7 stars

Great location & amenities. It was just a quick drive from town and only a two minute walk to a small shopping centre. You didn't have to worry about getting lost as big 4 is located on the main street of Ballarat.
We really enjoyed our time here and will definitely stay when we go to Ballarat again!

We had a great week stay for our annual family holiday, 7 adults plus 8 kids between 11 and 6. We stayed in a cabin and 3 sites. Staff were so friendly, pool was amazing and kids club was a hit. We will be back, might bring a couple of sausage dogs next time

We had the opportunity to stay at Big4 Windmill Caravan park over Christmas, New Year 2023, while the park itself was clean, amenities clean.
On Christmas Eve wild weather appeared and we got washed out while staying in a tent, no one was expecting the amount of rain, nor the cold temps, we were wet cold and miserable Christmas morning.
I enquired with park management in Christmas morning bout upgrading the remaining 9days we had booked on the tent site to a Cabin, the response I got was no, I was going to be charged full price for a swagman cabin, the additional price ontop of what we had paid for the site was ridiculous, all I saw was greed.
We had to seek alternative accommodation elsewhere.
The experience at Big4 Windmill Caravan Park was not a pleasant one, we will not be back.
Stayed overnight. Very clean, Staff were friendly we were walked down to our cabin by Jayde. Definitely recommend to stay there.
Had a shockingly horrible experience at Ballarat Big4, the Big4 company need to step in and change the management of this resort.

Stayed in their Blue Gum cabin, l was shocked to see the couch supported by bricks one of the legs was broken, went to speak with the team and the guy told us he was coming in a few minutes he was showing other guests their cabin, we waited a good 30 mins and had to go back to the office only to find him there on the phone. My thoughts he did not take us seriously or was a way of ignoring us because we were questioned how we became to know that the couch was broken. The Blue Gum is one of their exclusive cabins but our stay was nothing but a nightmare l can go on. Please guys some of us we leave our homes and busy lives to come and relax not to be cleaning the toilets were filthy l closed the toilet lid and what l saw there wooo, decided to clean quietly because l sensed we were perceived as trouble makers. Ooooh we were given a new couch but when the guy showed up he asked us if we had moved furniture around. I Found some of the staff to be very unprofessional, the way we were questioned about this couch, customer service -0. For what guests pay l think this cabin can do with a bit of refurbishing it has seen its days.
Amazing service, friendly & helpful staff. Great park amenities and the dog area is superb

One of the best, if not the best, pet friendly caravan parks in Victoria.
The pet friendly cabin, was brand new with its own secure outdoor space.
The direct view of the lake from the living room was amazing.
The dog pool area was very nice with fish in the water feature.
Stone throw from a shopping centre with Woollies and Maccas.
Kids really loved it too.
Great park with facilities for the kids and work underway adding to continuously improve it. Ensuite site was good but getting close to due for a renovation, but the value was hard to go past.

Been visiting this park for over 40 years now and I still love it!
Always get a great spot close to amenities and staff are super friendly!

We had a great stay at the Windmill Holiday Park. The staff was great. Everyone was so friendly, helpful and funny, especially Matt & Sam.
The park offers everything, e.g. a indoor swimmingpool and we loved the vibe of the location.
Thanks a lot and all the best :)

Had a great weekend stay in a dog friendly cabin. Not sure who had more fun our dog just loved the dog adventure area where he even had a paddle! Facilities were very comfortable and staff were fantastic. Will definitely be back!
Very comfortable cabin with great facilities.  Lovely, friendly and professional staff.  Highly recommend!

Molly and Sam were so friendly. The staff here are brilliant and super helpful. Never been to a better park. All facilities are well maintained and great quality. 1000/10 service. Will definitely be coming back!
Sam and Molly are the best, so attentive and helpful every step. Clean facilities and great camping spaces. Definitely recommend!

Best caravan park I have ever been to!!! I’ve never met such amazing staff, they are all so so helpful and accomodating. Sam especially is awesome, he did a great job from the moment we got here, he showed us to our site and explained everything thoroughly and was super happy to have us here! He even gave us a ride in the golf buggy to the front office when it was raining. Absolute legend! He also made extra room for us as we were silly and decided to try and book something last minute but everywhere was booked out! Awesome caravan park, first time being in Ballarat and it’s been the best experience so far all because of this caravan park. Could not recommend it more!!! Thanks so much for having us here guys, you’ve been great and handled everything so well especially being such a busy weekend because of the Spilt Milk festival. Will definitely be coming back!

Nothing was too much trouble for Sam.  Thanks for being so supportive throughout our stay. Great for dogs,  fenced sites down the back, the dogs don’t get disturbed too much, fantastic sensory area for dogs.  Great for kids with the indoor pool.  Freedom to ride bikes.
We found facilities and staff both to be top notch, great park.

We came in our camper trailer so I didn't need to fill in stars for that, but what a lovely experience. Upbeat bubbly staff, beautiful plants and flowers throughout. The indoor swimming pool was great and also had 2 spas and also a shallow pool for kids. There were chickens there too and the staff let my kids collect the eggs and pet the chickens. What's better than fresh eggs for breakfast the next morning! Also I must mention for those with dogs, there are areas there that are fenced in for your camper and your dog, was super cool and there was also another area that was also enclosed for your dog to sniff about. Overall I'd definitely come back with my family and also next time bring my dog now that I know she'll be safe.

Perfect spot for a family holiday, we stayed in the dog site was nice and clean with a good high and big fence all around and a amazing fenced dog park with a clean swimming area for our dog to enjoy, the pool, baby pool and splash pad was all heated and warm, lovely owners so nice and welcoming.
This CP outshines others with their staff and helpfulness.great dog sites. Spa and pool .very impressed with management

We accompanied 14 other couples on our bi-annual holiday to another caravan park in Victoria.
We always stay in a cabin, others do too or use their caravans.
Front desk service was very good, the standard one expects and experiences at Big 4 parks.
Roadways are wide and well paved. Caravan sites don’t all feature concrete slabs. New dog friendly penned sites didn’t have any slabs and would be dirty in wet weather.
The amenities are good, including and noticeably  the kitchen attached to the spacious air conditioned “Great Room,” made available to groups like ours for daily happy hour gatherings.
Pots, pans, utensils etc are basic but adequate. Fridge works well and is quiet.

My husband and I stayed here with our dog in what looked like a recent built cabin. It was so spacious, had a full kitchen, comfortable bed and a enclosed deck space. The deck leads into an your own grass patch for your dog to use. Didn't spend much time at the rock pool area for dogs but it looked nice and dogs would enjoy a dip in the water. Close to Woolworths and a nice cafe we got coffee at every morning. Nice area of Ballarat. We will stay here again for sure!

Easily the most dog welcoming place I have ever stayed. The entire back end of the park has dog friendly cabins which are just beautiful, overlooking the wetlands and very comfy beds, fenced caravan sites, a dog friendly camp kitchen and the absolute star of the show is the beautifully landscaped dog pond. Will absolutely be back, hands down the best place I have stayed between Melbourne and Perth!

We spent 2 nights here melbourne cup week. The park is very well maintained and very clean and tidy. The amenities were all well maintained and clean. Staff were friendly, helpful and accommodating. We’ll definitely be back to make use of the pet friendly area of the park.
Great for staying with the kids and our dog, so pet friendly

Easily the nicest, neatest and family friendly holiday park that we have stayed at. Sam and his family are passionate about the park and the guest's experience. Amazed at the pet friendly areas and local wildlife around the park. Plenty of activities for the kids and very relaxing for the adults, though there is a gym and pool if you want to keep your routine!
Well done to the guys at big 4 windmill Ballarat! See you again soon.

True blue Australian family business.
Great example for BIG 4 group management. How you can make BIG 4 parks dog friendly and children friendly!
Excellent customer service, Mark the owner of the park was very helpful and never seen anyone so confident when it comes to reversing the caravan 😊, if you want any passionate advice in fishing Sam will be happy to help you! Great family business, will be back.
Nilanka

We had an excellent stay here over the Melbourne Cup long weekend.  The grounds were clean and well looked after.  The kids loved the pool the gelati van, the jumping pillow and outdoor equipment.  Of course they also loved the go karts.  A particular shout out to Sam who was excellent with his local and historical knowledge of the area.  The staff were all very friendly and helpful.

We stayed in a cabin near the jumping pillow, close to all of the park’s amenities. The huge pool was clean and well maintained and both pool and the 2 spas were a great temperature allowing the whole family to enjoy no matter the weather outside. The kids loved the games room, playground and jumping pillow and had a hit of tennis using the free rackets provided at reception. We enjoyed seeing the chickens and the kids were blown away by the beautiful dog park on site. Thank you to the helpful staff that were happy to give advice on what to do and see in Ballarat including the things that might usually get overlooked and even where mum and dad might want to take the kids after an exhausting day at sovereign hill so that we could relax while they played.
This was a great holiday where the kids could run free with plenty to do at the park.

A well maintained and super dog friendly holiday park. The fenced off dog sites are the best i've ever seen and the dog park at the back is lovely. It has a natural pond system that the dogs can swim in. There isn't a huge amount of space for dogs to chase after a ball but they still get huge enjoyment from sniffing and jumping from rock to rock.

We spent 3 nights in a pet friendly cabin. The cabin was very clean and comfortable. The pet friendly cabins have a small enclosed deck and a yard for your dog to spend time sniffing around in. The holiday park is located not too far out of town and is very quiet and peaceful.  There is an enclosed dog pond area for your dog to run around in and take a dip in the pond if it wants to. The park is located right next door to a wetlands area to enjoy a lovely walk. The staff here are very friendly and helpful.

We stayed in a cabin for 3 nights, fantastic pool   spa area.  Friendly staff . The only thing that needs to be improved is the cleaning of the bathroom especially the basin & shower. Took pics to show the staff.
Great clean park also great facilities.  Pet friendly with individual fenced off sites
Had a great time, Sam was so good they had great staff 10/10
10/10 EVERYTHING, 100% RECOMMEND, SAM WAS GREAT🔥

We held our tourism industry event at the Big4 Ballarat Windmill Holiday Park in October 2023. The team from the park, and owners were extremely helpful, and went above and beyond to ensure our function was a success. The kitchen and AV facilities were great. We would highly recommend this venue for other organisations looking for a versatile space to hold a group meeting, staff training day, workshop, or function. A big thank you again to the team at park!

Great dog friendly park. You have your own fenced powered site so your dogs can relax without their leads on all the time. They have quite a few dog friendly cabins with more going in over the next few weeks. There is a great off leash dog area at the back with rocky garden beds to jump on and a waterway running down through the rocks ending in a deep pool with sandy beach so dogs can swim. The nearby camp kitchen has a dog friendly eating area adjacent to the kitchen separated by gate so your dogs can be there with you too. Staff are very helpful and amenities are clean and well maintained. Only suggestion I could make for the future would be more lighting in the rear of the park (newer area so may be coming still) and perhaps the inclusion of a dog wash.
Great cabin, very well set out loved that we could take our dog to stay with us. We will stay here again

One of the best caravan parks we have stayed in.  The kids loved the indoor pool, playground and bouncy pillow.  The adults loved the clean/hot showers, coffee van and extremely friendly personal service.  We will be back again 😊
Amazing staff!! All super friendly and accommodating!! Thoroughly enjoyed our stay.  Great facilities for team groups!! Thank you from team New Zealand!!

Great holiday park if you are looking for a place that the kids can enjoy and you can relax.

The park is large enough for the kids to enjoy and find new things to do each day.  The pool ha a spa for those who don’t want to swim.  Both the pool and spa are heated.  In cold days adults will find it difficult to get in the pool if you start in the spa, so go to the heated pool first.

Splash pad on the pool deck for the little ones but be warned they can wander right over the edge when running away from the splashing water, straight into the pool.

We did a couple nights camping, but plenty of caravans around.  If you camp, I recommend the back areas away from the middle of the park as the lights are very bright at night, (good for safety) unfortunately not great for some tents that aren’t “blackout”.

Camp kitchens are just bbq grill tops , microwaves, and stovetops with ovens.  Bring your own pots and pans.  Nothing was readily accessible for use.  Both kitchens have seating available but the kitchen near the front is connected to the “club house” game area where kids might have a tougher time focusing.

Stayed in one of the cabins as well and enjoy the simple setting for 6.  2 bunks (4 beds) and one queen/double size bed separated into two rooms.  The small kitchen had all you needed.
Bunks don’t include bedding.

The staff go along way to help you enjoy your stay from arrival to departure.  The staff escorted everyone to their camp site, ensuring they knew where each hookup was located and the limits of their area.

Kids club met during the school holidays around 4pm and there was usually a movie later in the evening with free popcorn for those that showed up early or on time.   Unfortunately it was always to loud in the movie area for the kids to hear the movie so they left uninterested in both attempts.

Playground, jumping pillow, pool, indoor sandbox for those raining days.  Shade is available but a lot of sites will have more sunny area then shade.

Coffee van was there with small ways and coffee twice daily (sometimes more) which was a hit for those that needed their caffeine.

Huge shopping center across the street about 1km away.  We took our bicycles into town (5km) for fishing and also site seeing.  Lots to see and do in the area for those that aren’t afraid to look.

Overall it was a great getaway.  Not always quiet but better than most caravan parks during the holidays.   It was kid friendly and mine were adventurous and always on the go.  Felt comfortable that they were safe and didn’t have to worry about speeding cars during our stay.

It was great! Next time I’d probably upgrade to a cabin with 2 double beds and I couldn’t connect to the wifi but aside from that it was brilliant!! So great and safe for the kids, a coffee van that made it easy to grab a coffee in the morning, so much for the kids to do and have fun! Nice and quiet, service was really great and I’d definitely be back for a family holiday again, no qualms!!

We booked into a powered pet site.  The sites are excellent, with large gates making it easy to back in, and plenty of room.  The sites/fencing is fairly new, so in great condition and fully sealed.  Friendly & helpful staff.

Only downsides are no trees for shade in the pet area, and no shower block in this area (it's on the other side of the park, but not far) although they're planning to build one.
My son is 7 and this became his favourite place! Probably because of the daily kids club (school holidays), he made so many friends and didn't want to leave the Big4 for anything.
If you have a dog, It's terrific.  If you have MORE than one dog, it gets better.  It's a relaxing way to camp/'van with dogs.  The message has gotten through.  They're building more.
Good not ask for anything else, the staff were great there dog park was amazing and the pet friendly caravan sites were fantastic definitely be back . Thanks for everything Dave.
Very nice.  Quiet.

We were very impressed with the friendly service, beautiful clean cabin and cleanliness of the entire park.  The dog friendly areas were excellent and we were delighted with the dog friendly cabin we stayed in.  Usually dog friendly cabins are the oldest ones but not at Windmill, it was very modern, had everything we needed, a beautifully made up bed with quality linen, a rain shower and was very spacious.  We can't recommend this park highly enough, well done to all concerned.  Thank you very much.
modern neat and tidy park. excellent customer service. shower and toilet block clean and tidy
Best park we’ve been to. Fenced yard for our van and dogs. Fantastic facilities and great hosts

This would be the best caravan park and dog friendly facilities I have been by far from all parks I have been to beautiful power site with synthetic grass private area and gate to keep dog from roaming just arrived  today for 3 night stay and very impressed .
professional and friendly staff and looking forward to coming back again
10/10 keep up the good work

We had a lovely weekend away with our dogs at this pet friendly park. The accommodation was well designed to have our dogs stay with a small fully enclosed yard off the cabin for them to wander into and out of. The “Dog Pond” was brilliant as a fully enclosed area where our dogs could freely wander going into the ponds if they chose (at least one enjoyed the water play). Really impressed with how this park has integrated features to include our furry friends.
Stayed for 2 nights due to car trouble. Staff were awesome, facilities where spot on. Loved the atmosphere and gardens around the park with plenty of Birdlife to watch
Great place to stay and clean amenities great friendly staff

Perfect family accommodation. My kids always love coming here. Indoor heated pool. Games room. Basketball court. Tennis court. Small gym and sauna.
Dog friendly and park owned chickens to visit.
Outside the city boundaries so you feel a bit safer with the kids running round.
Close walking distance to a small shopping centre with super market, kfc and Maccas.
Staff are very helpful and friendly.
Toilets and showers are extremely clean and heated in winter.
Prices are fair.
Would recommend to any one.
Great customer service from when we arrived to when we left, we will be returning!

Holiday stopever, very clean amenities lovely friendly park. Sam was welcoming allowing us to store our caravan for the day as we travelled to Frankston to attend a funeral. I would recommend  this park, oh yeah the spar and heated pool was just what we needed on a cold day

The location was great.

The customer service was amazing.

My children are still saying it’s a 5 star place
Sam was amazing with the kids, thankyou Sam for Taking the time to keep the kids busy.

The pool is the best also

Great little park!
Modern and clean amenities.
The indoor heated pool was awesome - especially on the super cold and wet July afternoons, great family park!

If you are coming in winter - like us - remember to pack your boots… Ballarat is a bit muddy!!

Highly recommend!

Edit added 2 years later: we were back in Ballarat and true to my word we came and stayed here again.  There's been a few changes since last time.  Last time there were 2 fenced dog sites. Now there's heaps as well as THE MOST AMAZING dog play area with a pool.  We brought our pup along this time (didn't own him 2 years ago) and despite the freezing cold weather, he took a brief dip and absolutely LOVED the dog play area.  He had a few plays with some other little dogs also staying at the park. This is such an amazing asset for your park.  As was the case last time,  all staff were amazing,  facilities clean and my kids enjoyed the indoor pool, bouncy pillow and games room. I don't recall if the swings were there last time,  but either way they were also enjoyed.
I'd love to return in hotter weather (today was 9° feels like 3°😬😬😬) so Gary can make full use of the dog pool!
See you next time!!

This is the best  caravan park we've ever stayed at!
We had an ensuite powered site which was fantastic.  The ensuite was far more spacious than I'd expected with a double sink and small bath.
We don't have a dog but we were really impressed with the dog friendly sites that were individually fully fenced so dogs could enjoy their holiday without being tied up.
We met many lovely pups during our stay.
There were many things that made this park superior to others.  Steel wool was actually provided so one was able to effectively clean the bbq. Most  places seem to ask you to clean it but give you nothing to do this with.
Camp kitchen was well appointed and always clean.
A time was actually given for kids movies each night instead of an ambiguous time such as dusk etc.  There  was also an announcement over the loud speaker with a 10 minute warning the movie was going to start which was appreciated as people on holidays don't always keep track of the time.
My kids loved that they got free popcorn and didn't have to  bug me to buy it for them.
Every single staff member I came into contact with was cheery and friendly.  Many  parks we've  been to,  the staff seem like they should have left the job  5 years ago and would rather you'd stayed home than come and bothered them at work.  At this big 4 park it was a delight to come across a staff member and have a chat.  I learnt a fair bit about Ballarat from one guy while he was cleaning the camp kitchen.
The indoor pool was amazing and really the main reason we initially chose this park.  What a fantastic asset! We were in there every day.  Usually i can't get in the water at caravan parks because they're freezing even when they claim to be heated.  We had so much fun in your pool. Thank you.
My kids loved the PlayStations (a couple need new controllers) , pool table,  table tennis,  all the outdoor play  areas.
I'm a crazy chicken lady and it was lovely to see some hens at the park but i think their yard and coop needs a spruce up.  I am scraping the barrel though as it's hard to find anything wrong with this place.
There was even a huge grass area where we could pay frisbee without fear of losing the thing.
If we come back to Ballarat,  we'll be staying here again.
Customer service was so rude on the phone who works on Saturday (Female staff).
We have just spent 2 nights at the Big 4 Caravan Park Windmill. We were impressed with Sams help in settling in his friendly, helpful attitude . Park very clean and orderly . Geraldine Peter Melican

June 29-July 3rd. We had a great weekend away at this park. We were allocated site 7 which is a pet friendly powered caravan site. We were extremely lucky to have had this particular site as it is the only site (at this stage) with artificial turf down on the ground. The rest of the pet sites were extremely muddy and wet. We had Sam direct us to our site and answer any questions we had about the park. We found Sam to be very helpful and friendly. We really appreciated everything Sam did to make our stay fun and stress free. Would highly recommend.

Fabulous park and amenities.
Awesome indoor heated pool and spas. Yes 2 spas!!
Super friendly staff. Everyone goes that extra mile to ensure you have a great stay.
Wonderful for a family getaway.  Great facilities and so many daily planned activities for the kids: Possum watching, kids club and games, movie nights, pancakes for breakfast. We will definitely be back. Special shout out to Molly for being super lovely. 😊
Very helpful and friendly staff great place for kids
Staff are so friendly and accommodating! Amenities were nice and clean, lots for the kids to do, and location was right near shops and not too far into town!

Great park with great facilities and a quiet location.
Minutes from Ballarat town and the attractions.
Staff are amazing and friendly.
Have been here a few times now and will definitely be back.

Terrible internet connection, next to none...when I called reception they knew about it and it had been a problem for them , but failed to let customers know before booking.... Not very satisfying and happy holiday...won't book again

It was lovely to be greeted with a warm welcome and lots of smiles when we arrived. All staff were very friendly and happy to help. The pool is a huge asset and was a great place to spend some time while in chilly Ballarat!!! Thank you for your kind hospitality. We will be back ☺️

The staff were so lovely and helpful, we also liked the cleanliness of the facilities. The pool was a great option for when the weather was poor and the dog park was fantastic we will definitely be coming back. Powered site enclosed
Such a lovely park. Nice n clean with great cabins and facilities and the pet pens are perfect with a little dog swim pool and service was so friendly. Highly recommend ✌️

We stayed two nights on a powered site in our caravan.  Ballarat Windmill holiday park would have to have to cleanest and warmest (in the middle of winter) amenities block in a park in which we have ever stayed.  Woolworths and shops were just around the corner and it was an easy drive down Remembrance Drive to the city centre.
GREAT CUSTOMER SERVICE AND GREAT PLACE TO STAY
Omg ! The best animal friendly kid friendly ! Amazing ! Best park . All the play grounds jumping pillow swimming pool the best !

I can't recommend this park highly enough! Customer Service + !! We have now stayed there 4 times and it gets better and better everytime!! Mark, Sam and Molly did their best to ensure that our group always has a great time! Mark does an amazing job helping us Mum's reverse our van's onto our sites, Sam is the king of the kid's and does an amazing job of entertaining them whilst they wonder around the park making memories and Molly's warm welcoming manner, calmed my storm when my car wouldn't start and we were late checking out!

Being winter the kid's ALL loved the indoor pool!! It is always a very clean and tidy park and we cant wait to return next year!! Also the showers are the BEST Big4 showers I've ever used!!

Great work guys keep it up!!
Best place to stay in Ballarat. Staff are friendly and helpful. Excellent facilities and clean, lots of gardens and trees, very quiet. We spent a lot of time in the nice hot spa relaxing.
Overall good
Amasing place animal friendly amasing staff very friendly
Been a few times now with the family. Service is always good, and the park and facilities are well kept. Would recommend.

Best park we have ever stayed in,  cabin was spotlessly clean, staff very friendly, great play area for the little ones,  awesome  BBQ area,  beautiful ensuite site for caravan. Definitely coming back here.
Got a fenced in Dog site was awesome best bathrooms on our lap shower and toilet arrea separate warm and very clean will definitely return and recommend

Family oriented!

What a park! We had the most amazing time over the weekend staying here, clean facilities
Right near everything, a lot of fun for kids and adults!

We will be back, but bringing our dog 👏
Thanks guys
